<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="ru">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>RYExchange — Обменник рублей и USDT на юани</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=Onest:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    :root {
      --gold:   #FFD045;
      --orange: #F07A20;
      --deep:   #3D1F08;
      --ink:    #2A1200;
      --muted:  #7A5535;
      --card:   rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
      --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
      --shadow: rgba(80,30,0,0.13);
    }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Onest', sans-serif;
      background: linear-gradient(145deg, #D4A07A 0%, #C08858 30%, #E8C090 70%, #D4A878 100%);
      min-height: 100vh;
      color: var(--ink);
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }
    body::before {
      content: '';
      position: fixed; inset: 0;
      background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.75' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.06'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
      background-size: 200px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999;
    }

```
/* NAV */
nav {
  position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 14px 40px;
  background: rgba(180,110,55,0.45);
  backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
}
.logo {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.35rem; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: var(--ink);
  text-decoration: none;
}
.logo img.coin-nav { width: 36px; height: 36px; display: block; animation: coinSpin 6s linear infinite; filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(160,70,0,0.35)); }
.logo span { color: var(--deep); }
.nav-badge {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--deep);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); padding: 6px 14px;
  border-radius: 100px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
}
.dot-live {
  width: 7px; height: 7px; background: #3DBE6E;
  border-radius: 50%; animation: pulse 2s infinite;
}
@keyframes pulse {
  0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(61,190,110,0.5); }
  50%      { box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(61,190,110,0); }
}

/* HERO */
.hero {
  max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 70px 40px 30px;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 40px; align-items: center;
}
.hero-eyebrow {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  background: var(--deep); color: rgba(255,230,180,0.95);
  font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.09em; text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 100px; margin-bottom: 26px;
}
h1 {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 4.2rem);
  font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.02;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em; color: var(--deep);
}
h1 em {
  font-style: normal; position: relative;
  display: inline-block; color: var(--deep);
}
h1 em::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute;
  bottom: 2px; left: -2px; right: -2px; height: 10px;
  background: var(--gold); z-index: -1;
  border-radius: 3px; opacity: 0.85;
}
.hero-sub {
  margin-top: 22px; font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: var(--muted); max-width: 420px; line-height: 1.65;
}
.hero-cta { margin-top: 36px; display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; }

/* COIN */
.hero-right { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.coin-wrap {
  position: relative; width: 340px; height: 340px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.coin-glow {
  position: absolute; width: 260px; height: 260px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,200,60,0.5) 0%, transparent 70%);
  border-radius: 50%; animation: glowPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  pointer-events: none;
}
@keyframes glowPulse {
  0%,100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.7; }
  50%      { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 1; }
}
#coin-hero { display: block; position: relative; z-index: 2; }

/* BUTTONS */
.btn-main {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  background: var(--deep); color: rgba(255,230,180,0.97);
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700;
  padding: 16px 30px; border-radius: 100px; text-decoration: none;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(61,31,8,0.35);
}
.btn-main:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 36px rgba(61,31,8,0.45); }
.btn-sec {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); color: var(--deep);
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700;
  padding: 16px 30px; border-radius: 100px; text-decoration: none;
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  transition: background 0.2s; backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
}
.btn-sec:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

/* RATES */
.rates-section { max-width: 1100px; margin: 20px auto 0; padding: 0 40px 50px; }
.section-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.09em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.rates-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
.rate-card {
  background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 20px; padding: 28px 28px 24px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.rate-card::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), var(--orange));
}
.rate-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 16px 50px var(--shadow); }
.rate-pair { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.currency-pill {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 100px;
  font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600;
  background: rgba(61,31,8,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61,31,8,0.10); color: var(--deep);
}
.rate-value {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 2.6rem;
  font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  line-height: 1; color: var(--deep);
}
.rate-value .cur { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: var(--muted); margin-left: 4px; }
.rate-sub { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--muted); }
.rate-upd {
  margin-top: 14px; font-size: 0.73rem; color: var(--muted);
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
}
.rate-upd::before {
  content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px;
  background: #3DBE6E; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* CALCULATOR */
.calc-section { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 40px 50px; }
.section-title {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.03em;
  margin-bottom: 18px; color: var(--deep);
}
.calc-card {
  background: var(--deep); border-radius: 22px; padding: 36px;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
  gap: 20px; align-items: center;
}
.calc-input-group label {
  display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,200,130,0.6); margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.calc-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.calc-input {
  flex: 1; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 14px 16px; font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
  width: 100%; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s;
}
.calc-input:focus { border-color: var(--gold); }
.calc-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
.calc-select {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 14px 12px; font-family: 'Onest', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; outline: none; cursor: pointer;
}
.calc-select option { background: #2A1200; }
.calc-arrow { text-align: center; font-size: 1.6rem; color: var(--gold); }
.calc-result-val {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 800; color: var(--gold); margin-top: 10px;
}

/* REVIEWS */
.reviews-section { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 40px 60px; }
.reviews-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
}
.reviews-link {
  font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--deep);
  text-decoration: none; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); padding: 8px 16px;
  border-radius: 100px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.reviews-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }
.reviews-carousel { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.reviews-track {
  display: flex; gap: 16px;
  transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
}
.review-card {
  background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 18px; padding: 22px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  min-width: 0; flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: transform 0.2s;
}
.review-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.review-avatar {
  width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--orange));
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--deep); flex-shrink: 0;
}
.review-author { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--deep); }
.review-date   { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 1px; }
.review-stars  { color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: 1px; }
.review-text   { font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4A2A10; }
.reviews-dots  { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 18px; }
.reviews-dot {
  width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(61,31,8,0.2); cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
}
.reviews-dot.active { background: var(--deep); transform: scale(1.3); }
@keyframes coinSpin {
  0%   { transform: rotateY(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotateY(360deg); }
}
img.coin-hero {
  width: 280px; height: 280px; object-fit: contain;
  animation: coinSpin 5s linear infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 24px 48px rgba(140,60,0,0.4));
  position: relative; z-index: 2;
}

/* FEATURES */
.features-section { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 40px 70px; }
.features-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 14px; }
.feature-item {
  background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 16px; padding: 22px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}
.feature-icon { font-size: 1.7rem; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.feature-title { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 0.98rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 5px; color: var(--deep); }
.feature-desc  { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }

/* FOOTER */
footer {
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
  padding: 26px 40px;
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted);
  flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;
  background: rgba(100,50,10,0.15);
}

/* FADE IN */
.fade-in { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(18px); animation: fadeUp 0.55s ease forwards; }
@keyframes fadeUp { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
.d1{animation-delay:0.05s} .d2{animation-delay:0.15s}
.d3{animation-delay:0.25s} .d4{animation-delay:0.35s} .d5{animation-delay:0.45s}

@media (max-width: 750px) {
  nav { padding: 12px 20px; }
  .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 40px 20px 20px; text-align: center; }
  .hero-right { order: -1; }
  .coin-wrap { width: 240px; height: 240px; }
  .hero-cta { justify-content: center; }
  .hero-sub { margin: 16px auto 0; }
  .hero-eyebrow { margin: 0 auto 20px; }
  .rates-section,.calc-section,.reviews-section,.features-section { padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; }
  .calc-card { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .calc-arrow { transform: rotate(90deg); }
  footer { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; padding: 20px; }
  .review-card { min-width: 260px; }
}
```

  </style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a class="logo" href="#">
    <img class="coin-nav" src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""/>
    RY<span>Exchange</span>
  </a>
  <div class="nav-badge">
    <span class="dot-live"></span>
    Курсы онлайн
  </div>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow fade-in d1">&#127479;&#127482;&#127464;&#127475; Быстрый обмен на юани</div>
    <h1 class="fade-in d2">Рубли и USDT<br/>в <em>юани</em><br/>за минуты</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub fade-in d3">Честный курс без скрытых комиссий. Обмен через Telegram — быстро, безопасно, удобно.</p>
    <div class="hero-cta fade-in d4">
      <a class="btn-main" href="https://t.me/RYExchange_bot" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M21.8 2.1L2.3 9.5c-1.3.5-1.3 1.3-.2 1.6l4.9 1.5 1.9 5.8c.2.7.4.9 1 .9.4 0 .7-.2 1-.5l2.4-2.4 5 3.7c.9.5 1.6.2 1.8-.8l3.2-15.1c.4-1.4-.5-2-1.5-1.6z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
        Обменять в Telegram
      </a>
      <a class="btn-sec" href="https://t.me/RYExchange_feedback" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Отзывы</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right fade-in d5">
    <div class="coin-wrap">
      <div class="coin-glow"></div>
      <img class="coin-hero" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="монета"/>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="rates-section">
  <div class="section-label">Актуальные курсы</div>
  <div class="rates-grid">
    <div class="rate-card fade-in d1">
      <div class="rate-pair">
        <div class="currency-pill">&#127479;&#127482; RUB</div>
        <span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:1.1rem">&#8594;</span>
        <div class="currency-pill">&#127464;&#127475; CNY</div>
      </div>
      <div class="rate-value" id="rub-rate"><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:1rem">Загрузка…</span></div>
      <div class="rate-sub">за 1 российский рубль</div>
      <div class="rate-upd" id="rub-upd">обновляется…</div>
    </div>
    <div class="rate-card fade-in d2">
      <div class="rate-pair">
        <div class="currency-pill">&#128181; USDT</div>
        <span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:1.1rem">&#8594;</span>
        <div class="currency-pill">&#127464;&#127475; CNY</div>
      </div>
      <div class="rate-value" id="usdt-rate"><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:1rem">Загрузка…</span></div>
      <div class="rate-sub">за 1 USDT</div>
      <div class="rate-upd" id="usdt-upd">обновляется…</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="calc-section">
  <div class="section-title">Калькулятор</div>
  <div class="calc-card">
    <div class="calc-input-group">
      <label>Отдаёте</label>
      <div class="calc-row">
        <input class="calc-input" id="calc-amount" type="number" placeholder="1000" min="0"/>
        <select class="calc-select" id="calc-from">
          <option value="RUB">&#127479;&#127482; RUB</option>
          <option value="USDT">&#128181; USDT</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="calc-arrow">&#8645;</div>
    <div class="calc-input-group">
      <label>Получаете</label>
      <div class="calc-row">
        <div style="flex:1"><div class="calc-result-val" id="calc-result">—</div></div>
        <div class="currency-pill" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);color:rgba(255,230,180,0.8)">&#127464;&#127475; CNY</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="reviews-section">
  <div class="reviews-header">
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:0">Отзывы клиентов</div>
    <a class="reviews-link" href="https://t.me/RYExchange_feedback" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M21.8 2.1L2.3 9.5c-1.3.5-1.3 1.3-.2 1.6l4.9 1.5 1.9 5.8c.2.7.4.9 1 .9.4 0 .7-.2 1-.5l2.4-2.4 5 3.7c.9.5 1.6.2 1.8-.8l3.2-15.1c.4-1.4-.5-2-1.5-1.6z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
      Все отзывы в Telegram
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="reviews-carousel">
    <div class="reviews-track" id="reviews-track"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="reviews-dots" id="reviews-dots"></div>
</section>

<section class="features-section">
  <div class="section-title">Почему RYExchange?</div>
  <div class="features-grid">
    <div class="feature-item fade-in d1">
      <div class="feature-icon">&#9889;</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Быстро</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Обмен от 5 до 30 минут после подтверждения перевода.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-item fade-in d2">
      <div class="feature-icon">&#128202;</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Честный курс</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Курс обновляется автоматически — никакой ручной манипуляции.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-item fade-in d3">
      <div class="feature-icon">&#128274;</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Безопасно</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Работаем по репутации. Сотни успешных обменов.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-item fade-in d4">
      <div class="feature-icon">&#129302;</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Telegram-бот</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Весь процесс — прямо в мессенджере, без лишних шагов.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div><strong>RYExchange</strong> — обмен рублей и USDT на юани</div>
  <div>&#169; 2025 &nbsp;&#183;&nbsp; <a href="https://t.me/RYExchange_bot" style="color:inherit">@RYExchange_bot</a></div>
</footer>

<script>
(function() {
  // ── CONFIG ──
  var RATES_URL   = './exchange_rate.json';
  var REVIEWS_URL = './reviews.json';
  var UPDATE_MS   = 60000;

  var rates = { RUB_CNY: 12, USDT_CNY: 6.5 };

  // ── RATES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function showRates() {
    document.getElementById('rub-rate').innerHTML  =
      rates.RUB_CNY.toFixed(2)  + '<span class="cur"> ¥</span>';
    document.getElementById('usdt-rate').innerHTML =
      rates.USDT_CNY.toFixed(2) + '<span class="cur"> ¥</span>';
    calcResult();
  }

  function loadRates() {
    fetch(RATES_URL + '?_=' + Date.now())
      .then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); })
      .then(function(data) {
        rates.RUB_CNY  = data.RUB_CNY  || data.rub_cny  || 0.0813;
        rates.USDT_CNY = data.USDT_CNY || data.usdt_cny || 6.5;
        var upd = data.updated_at || data.updatedAt || null;
        var updTxt = upd
          ? 'обновлено ' + new Date(upd).toLocaleTimeString('ru-RU', {hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})
          : 'обновлено сейчас';
        document.getElementById('rub-upd').textContent  = updTxt;
        document.getElementById('usdt-upd').textContent = updTxt;
        showRates();
      })
      .catch(function() {
        document.getElementById('rub-upd').textContent  = 'заглушка';
        document.getElementById('usdt-upd').textContent = 'заглушка';
        showRates();
      });
  }

  function calcResult() {
    var amount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('calc-amount').value);
    var from   = document.getElementById('calc-from').value;
    var el     = document.getElementById('calc-result');
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) { el.textContent = '—'; return; }
    var rate = from === 'RUB' ? rates.RUB_CNY : rates.USDT_CNY;
    el.textContent = (amount * rate).toLocaleString('ru-RU', {minimumFractionDigits:2, maximumFractionDigits:2}) + ' ¥';
  }

  document.getElementById('calc-amount').addEventListener('input', calcResult);
  document.getElementById('calc-from').addEventListener('change', calcResult);

  // ── REVIEWS (carousel) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  var REVIEWS = [
    { author: 'Александр М.',  date: '10 марта 2025',   stars: 5, text: 'Менял рубли на юани, всё прошло молниеносно за 20 минут. Курс честный, никакого обмана. Буду обращаться ещё!' },
    { author: 'Марина К.',      date: '7 марта 2025',    stars: 5, text: 'Уже третий раз меняю USDT через этот сервис, всегда всё отлично. Очень удобный бот, ничего лишнего.' },
    { author: 'Дмитрий С.',    date: '3 марта 2025',    stars: 5, text: 'Переводил достаточно крупную сумму, всё прошло без проблем. Менеджер быстро отвечал на вопросы. Рекомендую!' },
    { author: 'Ольга В.',       date: '27 февраля 2025', stars: 5, text: 'Быстро, надёжно, курс лучше чем в банке. Уже посоветовала подругам, все довольны.' },
    { author: 'Роман П.',      date: '21 февраля 2025', stars: 5, text: 'Полностью доверяю этому обменнику. Работаю с Китаем и регулярно меняю юани. Ни разу не подвёли.' },
    { author: 'Екатерина Л.', date: '15 февраля 2025', stars: 5, text: 'Очень профессиональный сервис! Отправила рубли, получила юани за 15 минут. Буду пользоваться ещё.' },
    { author: 'Андрей Н.',    date: '8 февраля 2025',  stars: 5, text: 'Давно ищу надёжный обменник для юаней — нашёл! Курс выгодный, сервис быстрый. Топ!' }
  ];

  var currentPage = 0;
  var perPage = 3;

  function getPerPage() {
    return window.innerWidth < 750 ? 1 : (window.innerWidth < 1000 ? 2 : 3);
  }

  function cardWidth() {
    var section = document.querySelector('.reviews-section');
    var sw = section ? section.offsetWidth : window.innerWidth;
    var pad = window.innerWidth < 750 ? 40 : 80;
    var pp = getPerPage();
    return Math.floor((sw - pad - 16 * (pp - 1)) / pp);
  }

  function applyCardWidths() {
    var w = cardWidth();
    document.querySelectorAll('.review-card').forEach(function(c) {
      c.style.width = w + 'px';
    });
    return w;
  }

  function buildDots(pages) {
    var dots = document.getElementById('reviews-dots');
    dots.innerHTML = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < pages; i++) {
      var d = document.createElement('div');
      d.className = 'reviews-dot' + (i === currentPage ? ' active' : '');
      d.dataset.page = i;
      dots.appendChild(d);
    }
  }

  function slideTrack() {
    var w = applyCardWidths();
    var track = document.getElementById('reviews-track');
    track.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + (currentPage * (w + 16)) + 'px)';
  }

  function renderReviews() {
    perPage = getPerPage();
    var pages = Math.ceil(REVIEWS.length / perPage);
    if (currentPage >= pages) currentPage = 0;

    var track = document.getElementById('reviews-track');
    track.innerHTML = REVIEWS.map(function(r) {
      return '<div class="review-card">' +
        '<div class="review-header">' +
          '<div class="review-avatar">' + r.author[0] + '</div>' +
          '<div>' +
            '<div class="review-author">' + r.author + '</div>' +
            (r.date ? '<div class="review-date">' + r.date + '</div>' : '') +
          '</div>' +
        '</div>' +
        '<div class="review-stars">' + '\u2605'.repeat(r.stars) + '\u2606'.repeat(5-r.stars) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="review-text">' + r.text + '</div>' +
      '</div>';
    }).join('');

    buildDots(pages);
    setTimeout(slideTrack, 0);
  }

  function goToPage(page) {
    perPage = getPerPage();
    var pages = Math.ceil(REVIEWS.length / perPage);
    currentPage = (page + pages) % pages;
    slideTrack();
    document.querySelectorAll('.reviews-dot').forEach(function(d, i) {
      d.classList.toggle('active', i === currentPage);
    });
  }

  document.getElementById('reviews-dots').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    var d = e.target.closest('.reviews-dot');
    if (d) goToPage(parseInt(d.dataset.page));
  });

  setInterval(function() { goToPage(currentPage + 1); }, 4000);

  window.addEventListener('resize', renderReviews);

  // ── INIT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  loadRates();
  setInterval(loadRates, UPDATE_MS);
  showRates();

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', renderReviews);
  } else {
    renderReviews();
  }
})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
